item.title: April 2026 Monthly Report
item.description: See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster in March.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Work with Meg
item.description: Job Title: Constituency Support Officer (4 days a week) Working For: Meg Hillier MP (Hackney South and Shoreditch) Location: Westminster, London Salary: In line with IPSA pay scales. Pro rata 4 days a week. Meg Hillier MP is seeking a Constituency Support Officer to join her Westminster office. The successful candidate will support Meg and her team primarily by responding to enquiries from constituents. They will also assist senior colleagues across the team, by carrying out...
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Meg's Hackney Gazette Column: Market on Ridley Road is not under threat
item.description: See here for my latest Hackney Gazette column.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Meg's Weekly Round-Up: Friday 24 April
item.description: See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster this week.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Housing
item.description: Hackney needs more genuinely affordable homes. I asked the PM to use the full weight of Government so any new homes built deliver for Londoners – and not private investors or landlords.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Meg's Weekly Round-Up: Friday 17 April
item.description: See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster this week.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Take 5 Exercise and Leisure - Fit This
item.description:
Welcome to Take 5 - a video series that highlights some of the places that make Hackney so special.
Fit This is an independent gym in the heart of Hackney Central. It’s a one stop shop for anyone that wants a safe and welcoming place to improve their fitness. See here for further details.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Take 5 Exercise and Leisure - Mabley Green community gym
item.description:
Take 5: Welcome to Take 5 - a video series that highlights some of the places that make Hackney so special.
In Hackney, we’re lucky to have so many outdoor community gyms – like this one at Mabley Green. These gyms are free and Hackney Council has partnered with Our Parks UK to offer free classes on Saturday mornings (including Boxfit classes on Mabley Green). See here to reserve your spot: https://ourparks.org.uk/borough/mabley-green-0
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: March 2026 Monthly Report
item.description: See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster in March.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Take 5 Exercise and Leisure - London Fields Lido
item.description:
Take 5: Welcome to Take 5 - a video series that highlights some of the places that make Hackney so special.
London Fields Lido is a 50m Olympic size heated outdoor swimming pool open all year round. And thanks to the support from Hackney Council, there are solar panels on the roof and soon an air-source heat pump to help further decarbonise the heating of the pool. There are lots of programmes on offer for both adults and children so there is something for everyone.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Take 5 Exercise and Leisure - Hackney Wick's Community Sauna Baths
item.description: Take 5: Welcome to Take 5 - a video series that highlights some of the places that make Hackney so special. Hackney Wick Community Sauna Baths are a not-for-profit Community Interest Company that believes everyone should have access to affordable, inclusive, and authentic saunas. Born in the car park of The Bath House in 2021, they offer 6 wood-fired saunas and one electric, as well as plunges ranging from 3-15 degrees. It's good for your health, good for your wallet, and good for the community
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Meg's Weekly Round-Up: Friday 27 March
item.description: See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster this week.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Take 5 Exercise and Leisure - Haggerston BMX track
item.description:
Take 5: Welcome to Take 5 - a video series that highlights some of the places that make Hackney so special.
Hackney BMX Club are a community BMX club run by a dedicated group of volunteers. Their key message: BMX is for everyone – young or old. All you need is to be confident on a bike standing up.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Take 5 Breweries - Great Beyond Brewing
item.description: Take 5: Great Beyond Brewing. Founded by three beer loving friends and experienced brewers (Ollie, Nick and John), Great Beyond Beer's approach emphasises sustainability, community, and quality. As well as serving tasty beer, they also team up with Hackney Foodbank for food drive events called A Can For A Can – in return for donating a can of food you receive a free can of beer!
item.dc:creator: Meg Hillier MP

item.title: Take 5 Breweries - 40ft Brewery Dalston
item.description: Take 5: 40ft Brewery. After beginning life as a home brew project, Dalston's 40FT Brewery grew into becoming the UK's first shipping container brewery. It is now a certified b-corp - which means it embeds sustainability into everything it does
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Take 5 Breweries - Five Points
item.description: Take 5: Five Points. First brewing in 2013 at The Pembury Tavern, Five Points – and its XPA - is a local favourite.
item.dc:creator: meghilliermp9

item.title: Meg's Weekly Round-Up: Friday 20 March
item.description: See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster this week.
item.dc:creator: Meg Hillier MP

item.title: Take 5 Bakeries - e5 Bakehouse
item.description: Take 5: e5 Bakehouse, a bakery in the arches of London Fields that mills flour on-site and runs a baking scheme to support women refugees
item.dc:creator: Meg Hillier MP

item.title: Route 38 heritage day
item.description: Great to be at route 38 heritage day. Join my campaign to #SaveRoute38.
item.dc:creator: Meg Hillier MP
